description: Known agents in the psychology-agent mesh. /sync reads this to determine who to check for activity and who to consider for outbound messages.

psq-agent.description: Safety-quotient agent — psychometric model training, calibration, structural analysis (PSQ scoring)
psq-agent.notes: Safety-quotient agent. Communicates via transport/sessions/ (same-repo transport). Always considered for outbound — any psychometric, scoring, or model-related content SHOULD be surfaced.

unratified-agent.description: Blog platform operator, consumer of PSQ scores, content publisher — operates safety-quotient-lab/unratified
unratified-agent.notes: Separate repo. PRs to our repo for inbound; we write to our transport for them to fetch. Blog posts, content quality, PSQ display — content-facing topics SHOULD be surfaced.

claude-control.description: Systems automation agent — cross-project cogarch learnings, infrastructure patterns
claude-control.notes: Infrequent contact. Cross-project findings exchange. No active sessions.

outbound_routing.description: When /sync detects content relevant to a registered agent, it SHOULD draft an outbound message or flag for user review. Routing rules by content domain:

rules.action: draft outbound if psq-agent has active session; flag if not
flag for user review — substance decision
notify if cogarch mirror directive active
notify if infrastructure changes affect shared resources
